title: phegopteris hillebrandii
intro: Phegopteris hillebrandii is a species of fern native to Hawaii, also known as the Hawaiian holly fern. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris hillebrandii are said to include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be utilized for its medicinal properties.
